chain.thought: Explanation: Consider only the seasons in Division 1 and count finishes outside the top 5 (positions 6th or lower). These are: 2004 (8th), 2005 (6th), 2008 (6th), 2009 (7th), 2010 (6th), and 2011 (7th). That totals 6 times.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
We consider only seasons in USL W-League Western Division 1 (2004–2013, excluding 2003 which was Division 2). Finishes outside the top 5 are positions 6th or worse.
- 2004: 8th (outside)
- 2005: 6th (outside)
- 2006: 5th (top 5)
- 2007: 5th (top 5)
- 2008: 6th (outside)
- 2009: 7th (outside)
- 2010: 6th (outside)
- 2011: 7th (outside)
- 2012: 4th (top 5)
- 2013: 4th (top 5)

Total outside top 5 = 6 seasons (2004, 2005, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011).
